title: Run worktree squad calibration pass
goal: Calibrate squad-leader execution and review quality against benchmark cases and record drift-driven improvements.

steps.text: Load `worktree-squad-calibration-benchmarks` and define benchmark cases for this cycle.
Evaluate benchmark cases and score verdict/classification outcomes.
Compute drift (verdict mismatches, confidence deltas, missing blocker detection) and classify severity.
Record calibration findings with concrete artifact update recommendations.
Pause for AJ review before changing scoring rules, thresholds, or core workflow contracts.
Apply approved updates and schedule next calibration trigger.

acceptanceCriteria: Benchmark matrix is complete for strong/mixed/weak cases
Drift summary is explicit and severity-labeled
Recommended updates are bounded and actionable
Core rubric/threshold changes are AJ-approved before implementation

verification.text: Confirm benchmark matrix includes expected and actual verdict/confidence
Confirm drift summary references benchmark evidence
